proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +42.2pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Regime stability is 'shifting' (only 1 day in Bear); if regime flips back to Choppy the cohort deactivates immediately
Portfolio is 22/23 UP_TRI by signal_type — any UP_TRI promotion concentrates signal-type exposure further regardless of regime gating
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +42.2pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +42.2pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Regime is Bear (day 1, shifting) so cohort is now active, but Bear exposure is only 2/23 (8.7%) while the 91.3% concentration trigger is on Choppy — promotion does not compound the flagged concentration, and TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental risk. Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-17) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime (91.3%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell (26.1%); UP_TRI signal (95.7%) (91.3%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime (91.3%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell (26.1%); UP_TRI signal (95.7%); recommended action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND sector=Pharma until Pharma cell share drops below 20% via natural Day 6 exits; additionally pause any new Choppy-regime entries until regime share drops below 80%.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 23-position long book simultaneously with no statistical justification, since the dominant Choppy×UP_TRI cohort is unvalidated (Candidate tier only). Pharma sector clustering amplifies idiosyncratic shock risk (e.g., regulatory news) on top of the regime risk.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy at 0.913 vs 0.80 threshold
UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell at 0.2609 (6/23) — breaches 0.20 cell threshold
UP_TRI signal_type at 22/23 = 0.957 — breaches 0.85 signal threshold
Book is fully directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY = 23/23)
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort only Candidate tier (n=234) — unvalidated edge
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (91.3%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell (26.1%); UP_TRI signal (95.7%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND sector=Pharma until Pharma cell share drops below 20% via natural Day 6 exits; additionally pause any new Choppy-regime entries until regime share drops below 80%.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 23-position long book simultaneously with no statistical justification, since the dominant Choppy×UP_TRI cohort is unvalidated (Candidate tier only). Pharma sector clustering amplifies idiosyncratic shock risk (e.g., regulatory news) on top of the regime risk.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration is triggered at 0.913 (Choppy, above 0.80 threshold) AND two cells breach the 0.20 cell threshold: UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma at 26.09% and UP_TRI×Choppy×Chem at 17.39% (latter just below, but Pharma is the breach). UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 22/23 = 95.7% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=234) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
